title: EP - Successful login issues new JWT and retains old tokens
precondition: Juice Shop 运行于 http://localhost:3001；已加载默认种子数据（verified 2026-05-30）; User already has a valid JWT from a previous session.
test_steps:
Step 1: Log in with valid credentials (username: validUser, password: correctPass).
Step 2: Capture the newly issued JWT from the response.
Step 3: Attempt to access a protected resource using the old JWT.
Step 4: Attempt to access a protected resource using the new JWT.
expected_result: Login succeeds; new JWT is issued and allows access; old JWT is still valid and also allows access.
